video_id: The Present - CGI Awarded short film (2014).f616.mp4.mp3
transcript: Hey sweetie, sorry I got home so late, but I had to pick something up from the work. It's such a beautiful day outside, you should let some sun in. Why don't you stop playing and open the present I got for you. Trini? Hello? Oh, yes, sir. I don't know why you didn't get the papers. I put them on your desk before I left. Okay. Whoa! Cool! Cool! She's gotta be kidding me. Get lost. I don't know what I'm talking about. Pfff... AATCH!
